name: Md Shariful Haque Hira
bio: With 15+ years across fashion, weddings, corporate and commercial photography, Shariful leads every major project with precision, artistry and uncompromising quality.

name: Arif Rahman
bio: Specialising in wedding and portrait photography, Arif brings a sensitive documentary-style eye that captures raw, authentic emotion in every frame.

name: Nadia Islam
bio: Nadia crafts cinematic event films and brand videos with a narrative-first approach and a signature warm, polished visual tone.

name: Tanvir Ahmed
bio: Tanvir oversees all colour grading and retouching, ensuring every delivered image meets PixelRoot Studio's meticulous quality benchmark.
